reasoning: Blade is a highly saturated cyan/sky-blue — direct match to 'sky blues' target. Guard accents are warm amber/orange — matches 'sunset oranges' and creates a classic warm-cool complementary harmony. Handle uses warm tan consistent with parchment-golds. Shadow pixels on the blade read as deep teal rather than neutral black/grey, satisfying the colored-darks requirement. Both hues (cyan, orange) are present in the Echoes reference palette. Mood is bright and cheerful, not grim or cold. No muddy desaturated color, no neon oversaturation, no corporate cold tones. Panel backgrounds are dark charcoal but these are display/preview artifacts, not part of the sprite itself. Overall palette compatibility and internal harmony are strong.
